title: Freaky Ali
overview: Freaky Ali is an upcoming 2016 Indian sports rom-com film directed, produced, and written by Sohail Khan, co-produced by Nishant Pitti, with dialogue by Raaj Shaandilyaa and presented by Salman Khan. It is inspired by Adam Sandler's Happy Gilmore (1996) and is scheduled for release on 9 September 2016.
